children.name: slide-subtitle
children.text: The website supports one operational loop for staff and one lightweight status loop for customers.
Signup or login returns user profile and JWT token.
RepairForm posts customer, car, issue, status, and cost data.
Staff search, filter, edit, delete, and complete repair jobs.
Dashboard recomputes workload and revenue statistics.
Garage shares a generated RM tracking code.
Customer switches from login page to CustomerTrack.
Frontend calls the public tracking endpoint.
Progress steps summarize received, in progress, and completed states.
